title: tagetes major
intro: Tagetes major, also known as the larger marigold or African marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The medicinal properties of Tagetes major have been found to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Tagetes major can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile and accessible natural treatment option.
